description: Source weights for 14-source canonical blend (retuned 2026-03-22). Founder-adjustable.

weight_rationale.tier_1_primary: KTC (1.2) and FantasyCalc (1.0) are the highest-signal crowdsourced market sources with the largest player pools.
weight_rationale.tier_2_expert: DLF sources (1.0) are expert-curated rank-based signals. Only source with native position data.
weight_rationale.tier_3_secondary_market: DynastyDaddy (0.8) is a secondary market/API source with good coverage.
weight_rationale.tier_4_supplemental: Yahoo (0.7), FantasyPros (0.7) are supplemental crowd sources. DraftSharks (0.5) lowered: rank-only with many unmatched newcomers. DynastyNerds (0.6) and Flock (0.6) have limited coverage.
weight_rationale.tier_idp: IDPTradeCalc (1.0) is the primary non-DLF IDP source. PFF IDP (0.7) provides expert ranking depth. Others supplemental.

how_to_tune: Edit the 'sources' values below. Higher = more influence. Set to 0 to exclude. Re-run: python scripts/source_pull.py && python scripts/canonical_build.py && python scripts/run_comparison_batch.py
